name: Spicy Mexican Bean Burger
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Canned red kidney beans; drained and rinsed
1 tsp black pepper or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together. Add more flour to create a firmer mixture, or more salsa if the mixture is too stiff.
2. Form into balls and smash into patties.
3. Bake at 450°F for 15-20 minutes, until firm, brown, and done.
4. Serve on whole wheat bun with lettuce, tomato, and salsa. Accompany with tortilla chips and a large glass of iced tea.
5. These can be grilled or pressed in those new sandwich presses for quicker and tastier results. The judges suggested adding 1/2 teaspoon of salt to the recipe.
